title: Assistant Store Manager - La Opala - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - La Opala - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
La Opala is actively seeking a talented and motivated Assistant Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Indore. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About La Opala:
La Opala is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Category Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with La Opala!
